title: Why This Semiconductor Equipment Stock Is Up Over 80% This Week
text: Aehr Test Systems surged over 80% in a single week following the announcement of a major $41 million production order from a hyperscaler customer. The order represents a significant milestone for the company, bringing total bookings to approximately $92 million. The rally reflects investor enthusiasm for AEHR's positioning in AI processor and data center semiconductor testing markets. The company's book-to-bill ratio exceeding 3.5x and effective backlog of $50.9 million provide substantial visibility into future revenue. Analysts increasingly view AEHR as a key play on AI infrastructure buildout trends.
